title: [VPB] Remoove recipe gun
description: Removes the crafting of VPB weapons.
body:
Removes the crafting recipes for VPB weapons.

This mod is especially useful for adventure maps that limit crafting, or for roleplay servers.
For example, on an RP server, players must find weapons in chests or purchase them, allowing for better control and gameplay balance.

A version also exists for SBW and TACZ.


⚠️Ammunition recipes are not removed!

⚠️Weapons are still available in Creative Mode.

⚠️This mod requires the mod "Vic's Point Blank".
